Appellant presents evidence.

Group Appellant/Defendant : marked as exhibits

Yurilia Moreno, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf
Silvia Ramos Spanish Interpreter assisting Ms. Moreno with Spanish , Mr.Moreno (husband) present.

The following documentary evidence is introduced by Respondent/Plaintiff:
Exhibits 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, and 7.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
